allow: PowerShell($p='c:\\KAAMKAAJ\\Personal\\SIGMA-SIGMA\\public'; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $total=\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; "TOTAL public bytes: $total"; "TOTAL public MB: {0:N2}" -f \($total/1MB\); "---- TOP 15 ----"; Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N0}  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName } } else { "NO public folder" })

PowerShell($p='c:\\KAAMKAAJ\\Personal\\SIGMA-SIGMA\\public'; Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File | Group-Object Extension | Sort-Object { \($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum } -Descending | ForEach-Object { "{0,-6} count={1,-4} total={2:N2}MB" -f $_.Name, $_.Count, \(\($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\) })
